Read normalized wearable device data: daily summaries (sleep, activity, body, workouts, menstrual cycle, profile) and per-sample timeseries (heart rate, HRV, blood pressure, glucose, SpO2, ECG, temperature, steps, calories, distance, sleep stream, workout stream, and more) across 300+ supported devices.
